load_budget.summary: Each realm caps how much **load** your equipped arts can carry. Actives, passives, and total load must stay within your realm budget.
load_budget.equip_fail: This build exceeds your load cap — remove a heavy art or raise your realm before equipping.

technique_rank.summary: Temper learned arts with spirit stones and category materials. Rank **5** and **10** sharpen the art's pattern; your realm sets the rank cap.
technique_rank.upgrade_fail: Gather the listed materials, then temper this art from **My Skills** or **`/upgrade-technique`**.
technique_rank.hub_line: Rank upgrades spend spirit stones + category materials + technique fragments at higher ranks.

sealed_manual.summary: Some manuals arrive **sealed** when they are above your realm. Break through or raise your realm, then study them with **`/learn`**.
sealed_manual.ready_line: A sealed manual in your ring can now be studied — use **`/learn`**.

pvp_legality.summary: Arena duels enforce load budget plus caps on legendary arts, control, shields, healing, and survival passives.
pvp_legality.duel_footer: Illegal builds cannot enter the arena. Check load budget and PvP limits in **My Skills**.
pvp_legality.profile_flag: Loadout illegal for duels — open **My Skills** to fix violations.

fragment_economy.summary: Technique Fragments drop from cultivation, hunts, adventures, and duplicate manuals. Spend them on **`/craft manual`**, rank upgrades, and passive tempering.
fragment_economy.item_description: Imprinted qi from a fallen art. Spend on **`/craft manual`** (3× + scroll + ink), **`/upgrade-technique`**, or duplicate manual conversion (2× per duplicate).
